name: Spotify
description: OAuth-backed music app embedded inside the host chat.

tools.name: launch_spotify
tools.description: Show the user's Spotify playlists. Requires Spotify authorization.

tools.name: create_spotify_playlist
tools.description: Create a new Spotify playlist for the user.

name.description: The name for the new playlist.

query.description: The search query, e.g. 'bohemian rhapsody', 'chill lo-fi'.
